scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
scripts.release:frontend: npm run build:frontend && npm run version:frontend
scripts.release:backend: npm run build:backend && npm run version:backend
scripts.release:frontend:minor: npm run build:frontend && npm run version:frontend:minor
scripts.release:backend:minor: npm run build:backend && npm run version:backend:minor
scripts.release:frontend:major: npm run build:frontend && npm run version:frontend:major
scripts.release:backend:major: npm run build:backend && npm run version:backend:major
